MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-12-2022 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2022 Set For Trial On Oct-31-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-27-2021 Continued To Mar-16-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-17-2021 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT F. ROBERT SOTO, D.D.S., INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

No appearances are made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant's "demurrer to the second cause of action of plaintiff's complaint" is sustained with leave to amend. The complaint does not adequately plead "lost money or property" under the UCL. (See Californians for Disability Rights v. Mervyn's, LLC (2006) 39 Cal.4th 223, 227.)

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-18-2021 Continued To Jan-19-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
